title: 4 Ezra 7: The Few and the Many
description: A Jewish apocalypse written after the destruction of the Temple: why does God save so few?
introduction: A Jewish apocalypse written after the destruction of the Temple: why does God save so few?

translation.original_text: Dixi: praestat ergo futurum tempus praeterito.
translation.text: I said: the coming age is better than the past... For this age the Most High made for the sake of many, but the age to come for the sake of few.
